name: Improper Address Validation in IOCTL with METHOD_NEITHER I/O Control Code
description: The product defines an IOCTL that uses METHOD_NEITHER for I/O but fails to validate the supplied memory addresses. Without proper address validation, attackers can supply arbitrary memory addresses leading to privilege escalation or system crashes.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node (IOCTL request with METHOD_NEITHER) provides memory addresses that flow to a TRANSFORM or STORAGE node performing memory operations without a CONTROL node that validates address ranges.
